rationale: The cited paper appears in a single literature-review sentence as part of a grouped list of prior studies on search advertising, where it is described as estimating spillover between non-branded and branded search. The citing paper does not subsequently use this paper's model, measures, or findings in its identification strategy, hypothesis development, or result interpretation. Its empirical design and contribution center on a natural experiment about Google Flight Search and substitution across paid versus organic channels, so this citation functions as background context only.
